uba.t: abbr. undenatured bacterial antigen 非变性的细菌抗原

ubangi.t: n. 乌班吉(非洲萨拉族)

ubangi-shari.t: 乌班吉沙里(中非共和国的旧称)

ubc.t: abbr. 英属哥伦比亚大学（University of British Columbia）

ube.t: 宇部[日本本州岛西南岸港市]

ubelin.t: 胞胆碱, 胞二胆磷碱

ubermensch.t: n. 超人；具有超过常人力量的人

ubi.t: conj.(处方用语)在那里,无论在哪里, 无论何时

ubi infra.t: [拉]在下面提及之处, 见下

ubi re vera.t: [法] 真实的地方, 事实真相

ubi supra.t: [法] 上面提及之处, 上面述及

ubiety.t: n. 所在, 位置, 客观存在
ubiety.d: n. the state of existing and being localized in space

ubipuity.t: [法] 到处存在, 普遍存在

ubiquinone.d: n. any of several quinones found in living cells and that function as coenzymes that transfer electrons from one molecule to another in cell respiration

ubiquinones.t: (ubiquinone 的复数) [化] 泛醌; 辅酶Q
ubiquinones.d:
plural of ubiquinone
n. any of several quinones found in living cells and that function as coenzymes that transfer electrons from one molecule to another in cell respiration

ubiquitarian.d:
n. One of a school of Lutheran divines which held that
   the body of Christ is present everywhere, and especially in the
   eucharist, in virtue of his omnipresence. Called also ubiquitist, and
   ubiquitary.

ubiquitin.t: n. 泛激素，泛素（一种存在于大多数真核细胞中的小蛋白）

ubiquitous.t: a. 无所不在的, 到处存在的, 普遍存在的
ubiquitous.d: s being present everywhere at once

ubiquitousness.t: 普遍存在, 处处存在, 随遇
ubiquitousness.d: n. the state of being everywhere at once (or seeming to be everywhere at once)

ubiquity.t: n. 到处存在, 普遍存在
ubiquity.d: n. the state of being everywhere at once (or seeming to be everywhere at once)

ubiquity of the king.t: [法] 君主正式在庭, 法官本身

ubisoft.t: n. 育碧：Ubisoft Entertainment于1986年在法国巴黎成立; 目前已经是全球最成功的交互式娱乐软件开发和发行公司之一。跻身跻全球10大电子游戏发行商; 欧洲第二大独立出版商。今天; Ubisoft在全球52个国家级地区已有超过1900名员工

ubitrons.t: (Ubitron 的复数) (=Undulated Beam injector)波动射束注入器

ubl.t: abbr. unbleached 未漂白的，原色的

ubs.t: abbr. 瑞士联合银行（United Bank of Switzerland）

ubu.t: abbr. you be you 你就是你自己

ubuntu.t: n. 乌班图；一种Linux操作系统

ubykh.t: n. 尤比克语(高加索语系中一种)
ubykh.d: n an extinct Caucasian language spoken exclusively in Turkey
